missions.purpose: Vytvořit kanonickou sources registry tabulkovou strukturu jako základ pro Source Resolution Layer a všechny consumery.
missions.currentState: 8 nekoordinovaných DB tabulek (scout_sources, artists, artist_links, artist_images, …), 3× duplikát Spotify ID, žádný audit log, žádný canonical platform identifier mapping.
missions.goal: Single polymorph sources table + source_handles + platform_identifiers + source_assignments + source_history; backwards-compat views zachovají legacy queries beze změny.
successCriteria: Migration runs clean v shadow DB (zero errors)
Backfill counts match: SELECT count(*) FROM sources WHERE type='feed' == legacy scout_sources count
Backwards-compat: stará scout_sources view vrací identické řádky jako před migrací
Existing Scout actions (Scout HQ UI, sources/page.tsx) fungují bez code changes
CHANGELOG entry zapsán

subMissions.name: Vytvořit migrace 20260517000001_sources_registry.sql
subMissions.description: Definovat tabulky sources, source_handles, platform_identifiers, source_assignments, source_history s indexy + RLS policies podle 03-registry-schema.md.

subMissions.name: Backfill script 20260517000002_sources_backfill.sql
subMissions.description: Konvertovat scout_sources → sources (type='feed') + source_handles; artists → sources (type='artist'); artist_links → source_handles + platform_identifiers. Zachovat UUID identitu.

subMissions.name: Backwards-compat views 20260517000003_sources_views_backwards_compat.sql
subMissions.description: RENAME scout_sources → _legacy_scout_sources; vytvořit VIEW scout_sources nad novou strukturou; v_artists_legacy view pro starý kód co čte artists table.

subMissions.name: Triggers: updated_at + audit log + platform_identifiers sync
subMissions.description: Auto-update updated_at sloupců; AFTER UPDATE triggery logující do source_history; sync triggery mezi platform_identifiers a source_handles.

subMissions.name: Smoke test v shadow DB
subMissions.description: Spot-check 20 random řádků každého typu; ověřit že Scout actions/sources/page.tsx queries vrací identická data před a po migraci.

subMissions.name: Rollback SQL skript
subMissions.description: DROP TABLE sources/source_handles/...; RENAME _legacy_scout_sources → scout_sources. Otestovat na shadow DB.

missions.purpose: Postavit jediné API mezi Sources Registry a všemi consumery — workers, Writer, Curator, Enrichment, Creator, Intelligence, CEO, Distribution.
missions.currentState: Každý modul si píše vlastní SQL queries proti scout_sources/artists/artist_links. Žádný cache, žádný shared scoring, žádný N+1 protection. Writer stage je TODO blocker.
missions.goal: lib/sources/srl/ s 5 resolve methods + Redis cache (60s hot, 5m warm) + scoring (authority/freshness/health) + REST mirror pro Python AI. Reference integration v Spotify Artists Worker.
successCriteria: srl.resolveForWorker('wkr-spotify-artists','tracked_artists') vrací validní SourceBundle
Cache hit p95 < 50ms (Upstash dev tier)
REST endpoints /api/sources/resolve/* vrací JSON matching SourceBundle shape
Spotify Artists Worker (mock) volá SRL místo direct DB query
Zero N+1 queries — všechny joins single SQL nebo batched

subMissions.name: Core types + interfaces v lib/sources/srl/types.ts
subMissions.description: Definovat SourceBundle, ResolvedSource, ConsumerIntent, CrossPlatformProfile, PlatformLinks podle 04-srl-spec.md.

subMissions.name: Resolver kernel lib/sources/srl/resolver.ts
subMissions.description: Implementovat 5 resolve methods: resolveForWorker, resolveForArtist, resolveCrossPlatformLinks, enrichClusterArtist, resolveTrackedEntities. Plus search() generic.

subMissions.name: Joins: artist-join + playlist-join + feed-join
subMissions.description: Per-type SQL builders s JOIN přes source_handles + platform_identifiers; zero N+1; vrací unified shape.

subMissions.name: Scoring: authority + freshness + health
subMissions.description: Algoritmy podle 04-srl-spec.md; čte source.authority_score, last_validated_at, worker_runs.error_rate; derives final scores.

subMissions.name: Redis bundle cache + invalidation
subMissions.description: Upstash backed cache s TTL per pattern; event-driven invalidation on source UPDATE; in-memory LRU fallback při Redis outage.

subMissions.name: REST API mirror /api/sources/resolve/*
subMissions.description: 8 endpointů (worker, artist, cross-platform, tracked, campaign, search, health, cache/invalidate) auth přes Supabase session + service-role token pro AI workers.

subMissions.name: Spotify Artists Worker reference integration
subMissions.description: Refactor wkr-spotify-artists volá srl.resolveForWorker() místo direct query. Proof that SRL works end-to-end.

subMissions.name: Unit testy: joins + scoring + cache hit/miss
subMissions.description: Min 70% coverage na resolver.ts, joins/, scoring/, cache/. Testuje cache invalidation events.

missions.moduleName: PR-S3 — Sources UI Redesign (central registry browser)
missions.purpose: Předělat /sources jako central registry browser s 8 sekcemi, per-source detail s 5 taby, cross-link mezi consumery, audit timeline.
missions.currentState: 4 fragmentované stránky (sources, sources/artists, sources/gallery, sources/media). Direct Supabase client bez API. Žádný cross-link mezi entitami. Žádný audit view.
missions.goal: Single cockpit s tabs Overview/Artists/Playlists/Feeds/Charts/Topics/Assets/Audit. Per-source detail s Used by drawer (cross-link), History timeline, bulk validate s live progress.
successCriteria: Všechny routes /sources/** vrací 200
Cross-link Used by drawer ukazuje consumer list per source
Per-source edit zapisuje do source_history s reason field
Bulk validate s live progress per row
Mobile responsive (test < 400px)
Lint + type-check clean

subMissions.name: Sidebar update: SOURCES jako clickable parent + 8 children
subMissions.description: Stejný pattern jako Scout HQ (clickable Link + chevron toggle). Overview default landing. Auto-expand když user na /sources/*.

subMissions.name: Overview client: KPI strip + category grid + recent activity + top consumers
subMissions.description: /sources page.tsx s reusable WorkerHealthCard pattern. Fetch z /api/sources/resolve/tracked + /api/sources/audit/recent.

subMissions.name: Category client (shared shell): Artists/Playlists/Feeds/Charts/Topics/Assets
subMissions.description: <SourcesCategoryClient type='artist'> reusable; toolbar (search/filter/sort/bulk); table s handles mini-icons + Used by badge.

subMissions.name: Per-source detail s 5 taby (Overview/Handles/Used by/History/Settings)
subMissions.description: /sources/[type]/[id] page; sticky header s authority badge; tab bar; reusable per type. Used by tab = drawer s consumer list + last fetch.

subMissions.name: Global audit page /sources/audit
subMissions.description: Cross-source timeline source_history events; filters actor/action/date/type; aggregations (kdo nejvíc edituje, broken sources rate).

subMissions.name: Shared components: handle-pill, authority-badge, add-source-dialog, history-timeline
subMissions.description: 10 komponent v components/sources/. handle-pill = mini ikona + verified indicator; authority-badge = colored 95/100 pill.

subMissions.name: URL redirects v middleware (legacy /sources/gallery → /sources/assets)
subMissions.description: next.config.ts nebo middleware.ts permanent redirects. Zachovat bookmark compat.

subMissions.name: Visual tokens + per-type colors
subMissions.description: artist #1ED760, playlist #1DB954, feed #FFB84D, chart #A78BFA, topic #7DD3FC, asset #E1306C. Sjednotit s Scout HQ tokens kde overlap.

missions.moduleName: PR-S4 — Consumer rewiring + Writer stage live
missions.purpose: Přepnout všechny consumery (Scout Workers, Writer, Enrichment, Artist Service) z direct DB queries na SRL API. Odblokovat Writer stage TODO.
missions.currentState: Writer stage je TODO blocker (lib/pipeline/writer.ts vrací notImplemented). Enrichment, Artist Service mají vlastní ad-hoc joins. Žádný shared cache, duplikátní queries napříč pipeline.
missions.goal: Žádné direct from('sources') calls v app kódu — všechno přes SRL. Writer stage produkuje články s artist context. Backwards compat: legacy queries dál fungují přes view.
successCriteria: Existing Scout HQ UI vrací identická data (regression test)
Writer stage produkuje články s artist context (cluster.mainEntity → CrossPlatformProfile)
Žádné direct from('sources') v app code — grep clean
Performance: p95 endpointů se nezvýší o > 20% vs baseline
Smoke test: full pipeline Scout → Filter → Curator → Cluster → Enrichment → Writer prochází bez crashe

subMissions.name: Writer stage implementace s SRL
subMissions.description: lib/pipeline/writer.ts (dnes notImplemented) volá srl.enrichClusterArtist(clusterId), buduje article s artist context. Replace TODO comment.

subMissions.name: Refactor enrichment.ts:211 → srl.enrichClusterArtist
subMissions.description: Nahradit ad-hoc story_clusters JOIN artist_links query za SRL call. Cache hit reduces duplicate fetches napříč clustery.

subMissions.name: Refactor artist-service.ts:69 → srl.resolveCrossPlatformLinks
subMissions.description: findOrCreateArtist + resolve platform IDs přes SRL místo 7 sloupcových selectů. Zachovat API surface.

subMissions.name: Scout Workers (all 12) volají srl.resolveForWorker
subMissions.description: Refactor wkr-spotify-playlists, wkr-spotify-artists, wkr-apple-music, wkr-deezer, wkr-youtube, wkr-rss, wkr-blogs, wkr-magazines, wkr-charts, wkr-trends. Spotify Artists už zerefactorovaný v PR-S2.

subMissions.name: Refactor lib/actions/scout.ts → SRL pro CRUD
subMissions.description: Zachovat API surface (Sources UI legacy nepostřehne), ale interně volat srl.search/resolveTrackedEntities místo přímo scout_sources select.

subMissions.name: Regression test suite: Scout HQ + Writer pipeline
subMissions.description: Playwright E2E: Scout HQ vrací stejné KPI; Run Scout vrátí stejné counts; Writer produkuje validní článek s artist context.

subMissions.name: Performance benchmark: p95 latence per endpoint
subMissions.description: Before/after měření klíčových endpointů (/api/scout-hq/workers, /api/sources/resolve/*); cíl: žádná regrese > 20%.

subMissions.name: Smoke test full pipeline + grep no-direct-queries
subMissions.description: Pipeline Scout → Filter → Curator → Cluster → Enrichment → Writer end-to-end. grep -r "from('scout_sources')" lib/ src/ → musí být prázdné (mimo SRL kódu).
